subject: SOCDS 2025/26 Update Week #22 - PreK Orange
text:
Email Ms. Annemarie
PEP Fundraiser
Bang Cookie Sale
The Bang Cookie Fundraiser is live!
To make Valentine's Day even sweeter this year, SOCDS PEP has partnered with Bang Cookies, a NJ bakery, to raise funds for SOCDS.
40% of all proceeds come back to PEP
to support the school!
To get started, click the link below or use the QR code to register and make an account. It only takes 2 minutes! Then purchase for yourself or share your link with friends and family to start raising money for our school.
Registration link:
https://bangcookies-fundraiser.vercel.app/join-fundraiser/south-orange-country-day-school-1769049949477
Licensing Update
This week there was a
New York Times
article describing health and safety violations at a Bright Horizons center in New York City. At SOCDS, we are deeply honored by the trust you place in us each day to care for your children, and we work hard to earn and maintain that trust.
While I have sometimes taken a critical view of our licensing agency because their standards can feel overly focused on small details rather than the quality of teacher-child interactions, they do play an important role in maintaining public confidence in the childcare industry. At SOCDS, we recognize that we are not perfect. When mistakes happen, we work to address them thoughtfully, adjust our processes, and remain transparent and clear with our 
families.
We rely on you—our partners—to let us know when something doesn’t feel right, or when your child shares something that is confusing or out of line with your expectations. Your willingness to communicate with us helps us grow, improve, and ensure that every child receives the safest, most nurturing preschool experience possible.
This year SOCDS is due for our three (3) year renewal.  Our DCF Inspector, Tina (we refer to her as "the women with the clipboard") will review all our processes, paperwork, and building safety.  We have passed our lead-free interior and water tests, as well as affirming that we are Radon free.  DCF visits are not scheduled and occur every six months at a minimum.  If you have 
any questions or concerns, please let me know.
Ramadan Moon Lighting Event
Sunday 5pm
Please join our neighbors as they begin the season of Ramadan.  Maplewood is hosting a moon lighting event at the Springfield Gazebo at 5pm on Sunday.
Reminder: Wear Red on Friday and SOCDS Closed on Monday, Feb. 16th
On Friday we will celebrate Valentine's Day by sharing our class-made notes and cards with each other and wearing red!  There is no need to send in additional cards for your child's class as the teachers have helped the children make their own in the classroom.
We 
will be closed on Monday, February 16th in honor of President's Day.
If you have any questions or concerns please text (1-646-226-8790) or email learn@socds.com.
Annemarie
Art with Ms. Jenny
Ms. Jenny used the music genre's the students study to inspire their art this week.  She also introduced them to Kandinsky and how he used bright colors to express what he was observing using all of his senses.

SOCDS Summer Camp 2025 - March 1st Early Registration
@SOCDSMOMENTS
Logistics
Dress Appropriately for the Weather:
Please dress your child in appropriate gear for the day.  In general (except this really, really cold weather) -- there is no bad weather just poor clothing.
Morning Snack
:  Please send in a morning, and if your child is staying for enrichment please send in an afternoon snack as well.  We generally allow children to choose their food and to listen to their bodies, but if you have any particular preference for what they eat and when, please just label the containers and we will accommodate.  Please remember we are a NUT FREE environment.
Water Bottles
:  Please send in a labeled water bottle with your child each 
day.  We do make sure that they drink water throughout the day.  We have two water fountains which we use to refill the bottles (so they may come home full.)
Parking:
Please remember that Vose Avenue is an active busy street.  Please pull up on the
school side
of Vose in front of the school.  It is safest to go around the block instead of turning around in driveways.  For your child's safety please try to have them leave your car from the sidewalk side of the car.
Please do not block our neighbors driveway, even for a few minutes.
Tuition:
As I receive payments I update the statement and send you a copy.  If you do not receive those from me please let me 
know.
Hours
Morning Care 7:30-8:30am
Morning Drop off is between 8:30-9am
Afternoon Pick Up is between 3:10- 3:20pm
Extended Day 3:20-5:30/5:45pm
South Orange Country Day School
461 Vose Avenue, South Orange
973.762.6451
You are receiving this email because your child attends SOCDS.  If you no longer wish to receive these updates, please unsubscribe below.
